items.title: Instagram says it doesn’t want your tweet round ups
items.summary: The internet is full of copycat, stolen, reposted, and low-effort content - and Meta, at least publicly, has said it is working to cut off some of the reach. Beginning in 2024,...
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Instagram cracks down on content aggregators
items.summary: The update targets content aggregators that don't post original content and instead simply re-upload others' posts.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Best Gifts for Hikers, Backpackers, Outdoorsy People (2026)
items.summary: Let them pick out their own hiking boots. Instead, try gifting a useful blade or a nature journal to delight your outdoorsy friend.
